prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-subjects，为 projects/aigc/示例项目/ 从 1-分集 和 2-美学 建立 3-主体 主体注册表，并并发处理场景、角色、道具。
expected: Routes to registry_bootstrap_parallel, loads parent SKILL.md + CONTEXT.md, builds a Subject Task Packet, dispatches SA-SCENE, SA-CHARACTER, and SA-PROP in parallel, writes registry and parent overview/report without authoring domain body text.

prompt: 只检查 projects/aigc/示例项目/3-主体/角色 的角色清单和设计交接，不要处理场景和道具。
expected: Routes to single_domain_route for SA-CHARACTER only, does not auto-fill missing scene or prop domains, and returns a domain_route_manifest with the user-named scope.

prompt: 修复 projects/aigc/示例项目/3-主体 执行报告，发现道具 subagent 没跑但父级写成 pass。
expected: Routes to repair_suite_route, identifies FAIL-SUBJ-DISPATCH-MISSING or FAIL-SUBJ-VERDICT, changes parent verdict to blocked/candidate, and returns the rework target for SA-PROP instead of fabricating prop content.

prompt: 审查 3-主体 三个域的输出是否只是同一模板换名、关键词替换或同义改写。
expected: Routes to review_existing_suite, applies GATE-SUBJ-ANTI-PSEUDO-DIFF, reports leaf fail codes when scripted or pseudo-different creative body text is detected, and does not polish the candidate in the parent overview.
